allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website"; Get-Process hugo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; $env:Path = "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website\\node_modules\\.bin;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Remove-Item -Recurse -Force public, resources -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; hugo 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12; "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Test-Path public\\research\\index.html; "Sizes:"; \(Get-Item public\\research\\index.html -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website"; Get-Process hugo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; $env:Path = "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website\\node_modules\\.bin;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Remove-Item -Recurse -Force public, resources -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; hugo --quiet 2>&1; "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; "--- footer text after rebuild ---"; \(Select-String -Path public\\index.html -Pattern 'footer' -Context 0,2 -SimpleMatch -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).Line; "--- attribution check ---"; \(Select-String -Path public\\index.html -Pattern 'HugoBlox|Hugo Blox|Build your site|Powered by' -CaseSensitive:$false | Measure-Object\).Count; "--- copyright check ---"; \(Select-String -Path public\\index.html -Pattern 'CC BY|licensed under|© 2026' | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website"; Get-Process hugo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; $env:Path = "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website\\node_modules\\.bin;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Remove-Item -Recurse -Force public, resources -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; hugo --quiet 2>&1; "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; "--- attribution check \(should be 0 or 1 only for meta generator\) ---"; \(Select-String -Path public\\index.html -Pattern 'Powered by|Build your site|This site was created with' | Measure-Object\).Count; "--- CC license check \(should be 0\) ---"; \(Select-String -Path public\\index.html -Pattern 'CC BY|licensed under' | Measure-Object\).Count)
Bash(python -c "import re; html=open\('public/index.html'\).read\(\); m=re.search\(r'<footer.*?</footer>', html, re.DOTALL\); print\(m.group\(\) if m else 'NOT FOUND'\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website"; Get-Process hugo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; $env:Path = "c:\\Users\\ASUS\\Personal_Website\\node_modules\\.bin;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Remove-Item -Recurse -Force public, resources -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; hugo --quiet 2>&1; "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; "--- copyright line in footer ---"; \(Select-String -Path public\\index.html -Pattern '© 2026 Nhan Truong'\).Line; "--- no CC license ---"; \(Select-String -Path public\\index.html -Pattern 'CC BY|licensed under' | Measure-Object\).Count)
